2605.07985.title: Dooly: Configuration-Agnostic, Redundancy-Aware Profiling for LLM Inference Simulation
2605.07985.paper_summary: Selecting the optimal LLM inference configuration requires evaluation across hardware, serving engines, attention backends, and model architectures, since no single choice performs best across all workloads. Profile-based simulators are the standard tool, yet they hardcode their operation set to a specific configuration and re-profile every operation from scratch, making exploration prohibitively expensive. This cost stems from a missing structural understanding: every input dimension of each operation is fixed by the model configuration or determined by the incoming request. Many model-configuration values (e.g., head size, layer count) recur across models, so the same operation runs in many configurations; a single sweep over the request-dependent dimensions can serve them all. We present Dooly, which exploits this structure to achieve configuration-agnostic, redundancy-aware profiling. Dooly performs a single inference pass, labels each input dimension with its origin via taint propagation, and selectively profiles only operations absent from its latency database; stateful operations such as attention are isolated by reusing the serving engine's own initialization code, eliminating manual instrumentation. It builds latency regression models based on the database, which becomes a drop-in backend for existing simulators. Across two GPU platforms, three attention backends, and diverse model architectures, Dooly achieves simulation accuracy within 5% MAPE for TTFT and 8% for TPOT while reducing profiling GPU-hours by 56.4% across 12 models compared to the existing profiling approach.
2605.07985.paper_summary_zh: 選擇最佳的 LLM 推理配置需要在硬體、服務引擎、注意力後端和模型架構之間進行評估，因為沒有單一選擇能在所有工作負載中表現最佳。基於配置文件的模擬器是標準工具，但它們將操作集硬編碼為特定配置，並從頭開始重新分析每個操作，這使得探索變得過於昂貴。這種成本源於缺乏結構性理解：每個操作的每個輸入維度都由模型配置固定或由進來的請求決定。許多模型配置值（例如，頭部大小、層數）在不同模型中重複，因此相同的操作在多種配置中運行；對於依賴請求的維度進行一次掃描即可服務所有需求。我們提出了 Dooly，它利用這種結構實現配置無關的、關注冗餘的分析。Dooly 執行單次推理過程，通過污點傳播標記每個輸入維度的來源，並僅選擇性地分析其延遲數據庫中缺失的操作；狀態操作如注意力通過重用服務引擎自己的初始化代碼來隔離，消除了手動儀器化。它基於數據庫構建延遲回歸模型，該模型成為現有模擬器的即插即用後端。在兩個 GPU 平台、三個注意力後端和多樣的模型架構中，Dooly 在 TTFT 上達到 5% MAPE 的模擬準確度，在 TPOT 上達到 8%，同時將 12 個模型的分析 GPU 小時減少了 56.4%，相比於現有的分析方法。
2605.07985.author: Joon Ha Kim et.al.
2605.07985.authors: Joon Ha Kim, Geon-Woo Kim, Anoop Rachakonda, Daehyeok Kim
